evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Design, build, test, and own end-to-end data models within our dbt-powered 'Unified Data Model.' You will ensure models are reliable, well-documented, and aligned with business logic.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Designing, building, testing, and owning end-to-end models with an emphasis on reliability and documentation is quality-and-ownership language, supporting a rigour classification.
evidence.domain_risk: B2B SaaS metrics: ARR, NRR, churn, PLG
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: B2B SaaS metrics like ARR, NRR, churn, and PLG are business-decision metrics without regulatory or financial-reporting consequence, matching moderate domain risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: product and go-to-market teams; go-to-market teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, build, test, and own end-to-end data models within our dbt-powered 'Unified Data Model'
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Owning end-to-end models within an established 'Unified Data Model' framework indicates an existing, actively growing stack rather than a first build, matching mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Implement AI data agents and the necessary underlying foundations to automate reporting and alerting
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Naming a specific initiative — implementing AI data agents and their underlying foundations — reflects concrete, role-specific detail a hiring manager would include rather than generic language.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Act as a consultant to product and go-to-market teams, moving from reactive data support to proactive strategic insights.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Acting as a consultant to both product and go-to-market teams spans two different stakeholder groups, supporting a mixed stakeholder-orientation classification.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design, build, test, and own end-to-end data models within our dbt-powered "Unified Data Model." Act as a consultant to product and go-to-market teams, moving from reactive data support to proactive strategic insights.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Owning end-to-end data models (execution) while also moving toward proactive strategic insights as a consultant (direction-setting) combines both modes, matching mixed autonomy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: extend existing Unified Data Model (fix_scale) while implementing AI data agents and governance foundations (greenfield)
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Extending the existing Unified Data Model is fix_scale work, while implementing new AI data agents and governance foundations is greenfield work, so the combination supports a mixed classification.
evidence.work_arrangement: Hybrid schedule: in-office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays. Flexible Wednesdays and Fridays
evidence.ai_role: Implement AI data agents and the necessary underlying foundations to automate reporting and alerting
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Role requires building AI infrastructure foundations for automated reporting agents.
evidence.testing_framing: Design, build, test, and own end-to-end data models within our dbt-powered 'Unified Data Model.' You will ensure models are reliable
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns testing and quality of data models, with explicit responsibility for reliability.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: You will ensure models are reliable, well-documented, and aligned with business logic
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational reliability and model quality are primary concerns, though not framed as compliance or risk to stakeholders.
